---
title: "Games"
description: "Statistics-themed games built for fun and learning."
resources:
  - sigma-strike.html
---

## Sigma Strike

A retro space shooter where you defend the distribution from rogue outliers. Chain kills for combo multipliers, collect power-ups, and battle bosses every 10 waves.

**Controls:** Arrow keys or A/D to move, Space to shoot, B for bomb, P to pause. On mobile, use the virtual joystick with auto-fire.

```{=html}
<div style="width:100%;max-width:520px;margin:1.5rem auto;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid #ddd;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);">
  <iframe src="sigma-strike.html" style="width:100%;height:780px;border:none;display:block;" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>
```

<p style="text-align:center;font-size:0.85em;color:#888;margin-top:0.5rem;">
  Best experienced fullscreen on desktop. <a href="sigma-strike.html" target="_blank">Open in new tab →</a>
</p>
